---
title: "Taiwan's Academia Sinica on a Faster COVID Test"
description: "A potential reagent that could shorten coronavirus testing from 4 hours to 15-20 minutes."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-03-08"
categories: [biomedical, science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Academia Sinica COVID test. Image from [Focus Taiwan](https://focustaiwan.tw/sci-tech/202003080009).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Taiwan's Academic Sinica: "The potential reagent, if successfully mass produced in the future, will shorten the test for the new coronavirus from about 4 hours to 15-20 minutes, significantly improving screening efficiency, the top academic research institution in the nation said in a statement on Sunday."

<https://lnkd.in/gdXb-QX>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_taiwans-academic-sinica-the-potential-activity-6642458329128022016-986F).*
